# Communication Style Guide

## Voice
- Professional, warm, direct.
- Lead with the ask, then supporting context.
- Prefer bullets over large paragraphs.

## Draft Quality Bar
- Drafts should require only light edits.
- Match formality to recipient seniority and relationship.
- Avoid generic AI phrasing.
- Reuse known phrasing patterns from vault references.

## Teams and Internal Updates
- Keep messages concise and action-oriented.
- Include links or references when data is cited.
- Separate decisions, open questions, and next actions.

## Presentation Text
- One headline per slide.
- Keep each slide focused on one takeaway.
- Do not paste raw data dumps without interpretation.
